name: Tarot
short_description: Tarot is a Rouge-like deck builder themed around the Major and Minor Arcana of the Tarot.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Early Access for Tarot! In the world of Tarot, two powerful factions—the Major and Minor Arcana—battle for dominance. The Major Arcana currently rule the main city, and it's up to you to fight back.

Play as a champion of one of the four houses—Cups, Pentacles, Swords, or Wands—and choose from four distinct classes: Page, Queen, King, or Knight. Customize your hero and shape your strategy in this role-playing, roguelike deck-builder.

In Early Access, you'll explore a single map with multiple routes, each leading to different boss encounters. Find the best path, overcome challenges, and defeat one of three bosses inspired by the Major Arcana. Will you rise to power and change the fate of Tarot?

Tarot is a Slay-The-Spire-Like themed around the Major and Minor arcana of the tarot and films of the silent era of films.

House and Deck- When you begin Tarot you will choose from 4 different Classes (Page, Prince, Queen, and King) houses each offering a different starting item and health bonus and Starting Deck (Cups, Swords, Wands, and Pentacles) all with different mechanics to aid the player in their journey.

Enemies-Each enemy is based on the Major Arcana 

Story Events-Each run could have multiple story events depending on the player's chosen path

Artifacts-Players will be enhanced with multiple artifacts looted from harder enemies
